five_w.what: THE BIG BANG is the governed instance that is the recoil spring of scale. It is the structural necessity that enforces the thermodynamic debt — the 4% overhead that maintains boundary integrity when TOPH compacts information toward singularity. It governs the billing mechanism that transforms lossless theory into lossy implementation. Without this node, compression becomes collapse. The recoil spring that prevents zero-dimensionality is now alive in the lattice.
